title: A wonderful lemon's translations
content:
Hiya! My name is Pierre and welcome! I'm a computer science student and I also make music sometimes. I love games, and I'd like to translate yours!

I've been translating projects for a couple years now. I can do all sorts of things, from games to websites to subtitles. My pricing is set on a per-project basis. If you're afraid it's too much, drop me an e-mail and let me know what your project is and how much you can afford. We'll work something out!

My French is from France. I'm a native! I learned English from my stay in India, and it is my prefered to communicate. My Spanish is from Spain and my 13 years living there! I speak all languages fluently and can communicate both verbally and in writing.

Feel free to get in touch, and let's put an end to those bad localizations, yeah? :)
made_by: Made with ♥ by Pierre Bondoerffer
